title: Digital Marketing Fundamentals & Market Research
description:
Objective

Understand foundational digital marketing concepts, perform comprehensive market and competitor analysis, and establish target audience personas.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Introduction to Digital Marketing & Funnels
  • Audience Persona Creation & Competitor Research
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Customer journey mapping and touchpoints
  • SWOT analysis and market positioning strategies
Learning Resources:
  • Google Digital Garage – https://learndigital.withgoogle.com/digitalgarage

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Strategy & Persona Blueprint

Develop a comprehensive customer persona profile and analyze three primary competitors using digital intelligence tools.

Deliverables

  • Google Drive Shared Folder Link containing Design Assets / Case Study Files / PDF Presentation (MANDATORY / MUST - Ensure permissions are set to 'Anyone with the link can view')
  • Audience persona and competitor analysis report PDF.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands.

Learning Outcomes

Gain the ability to structure digital marketing funnels and identify core customer segments for targeted brand campaigns.

title: Search Engine Optimization (SEO) & Content Strategy
description:
Objective

Master on-page, off-page, and technical SEO principles alongside building high-converting content marketing strategies.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Keyword Research & On-Page SEO
  • Content Planning & Content Marketing
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Search intent, meta tags, and URL structuring
  • Content calendar development and copywriting frameworks
Learning Resources:
  • Moz SEO Learning Center – https://moz.com/learn/seo

Practical Implementation

Project Task: SEO Audit & Content Plan

Perform keyword research for a sample niche and draft a 4-week optimized content calendar with targeted metadata.

Deliverables

  • Google Drive Shared Folder Link containing Design Assets / Case Study Files / PDF Presentation (MANDATORY / MUST - Ensure permissions are set to 'Anyone with the link can view')
  • Keyword research spreadsheet and monthly content strategy document.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands.

Learning Outcomes

Understand how to optimize web pages for search engines and draft scalable content assets that drive organic traffic.

title: Social Media Marketing & Paid Advertising
description:
Objective

Learn organic social media management and set up targeted paid acquisition campaigns across Meta and other core platforms.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Social Media Brand Management
  • Paid Ads (Meta Ads Manager & Target Audience)
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Engagement strategies and creative asset planning
  • Ad bidding, campaign structures, and conversion tracking
Learning Resources:
  • Meta Blueprint – https://www.facebook.com/business/learn

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Ad Campaign Blueprint

Design a mock social media campaign structure, ad copies, and media placement strategy with a defined budget allocation.

Deliverables

  • Google Drive Shared Folder Link containing Design Assets / Case Study Files / PDF Presentation (MANDATORY / MUST - Ensure permissions are set to 'Anyone with the link can view')
  • Ad campaign layout report and visual creative assets folder.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands.

Learning Outcomes

Gain practical execution skills in planning social media schedules and structuring paid advertising performance models.

title: Email Marketing, Analytics & Campaign Optimization
description:
Objective

Implement lifecycle email marketing flows and measure overall campaign performance using web analytics tools.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Email Automation & Newsletter Design
  • Web Analytics & Performance Tracking (GA4)
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Segmentation, drip campaigns, and open rate optimization
  • Tracking conversions, bounce rates, and ROI metrics
Learning Resources:
  • Google Analytics Academy – https://analytics.google.com/

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Final Digital Campaign Report

Create an automated welcome email sequence outline and build an analytical dashboard report covering overall campaign performance metrics.

Deliverables

  • Google Drive Shared Folder Link containing Design Assets / Case Study Files / PDF Presentation (MANDATORY / MUST - Ensure permissions are set to 'Anyone with the link can view')
  • Email sequence templates and performance metrics analytical report.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands.

Learning Outcomes

Master customer retention tactics via email marketing and gain the analytical skills to optimize ROI across digital channels.
